title: Bengaluru fintech startup raises $120 million to expand SME lending
description: The funding round was led by global venture capital firms looking for stronger credit access in India.
content: The startup plans to use the fresh funding to grow underwriting, hire product teams, and deepen partnerships with small businesses across India.

title: Global AI startup secures Series C funding as enterprise automation budgets rise
description: Investors said the venture capital round reflects stronger demand for workflow automation and applied AI tools.
content: The startup said it will use the funding to expand into new regions, invest in compliance, and support larger enterprise customers.

title: Indian health-tech startup explores IPO timeline after reaching operating break-even
description: The company said it is evaluating an IPO only after stabilizing margins and scaling its hospital network.
content: Bankers expect an IPO window to depend on public-market appetite, profitability visibility, and sector sentiment over the next year.

title: Large software group announces acquisition of cloud security startup
description: The acquisition is expected to accelerate product bundling and give early investors a clearer exit benchmark.
content: Analysts said the deal could encourage more acquisition activity across enterprise software if integration goes smoothly.

title: Climate-tech unicorn wins fresh backing as investors revisit energy transition startups
description: The unicorn said new funding will support manufacturing capacity and longer customer contracts.
content: The deal is being watched as a signal for broader risk appetite toward capital-intensive startup models in clean energy.

title: Mumbai consumer app startup targets profitability after funding slowdown reshapes hiring
description: Founders said the company is shifting from aggressive expansion to cash discipline after a tougher funding cycle.
content: The startup is slowing hiring, focusing on repeat users, and preparing for a longer path before the next funding round.
